title: Theme: House and Furniture
description: Vocabulary for describing parts of the house and daily living objects.

sentences.spanish: La cocina está limpia y lista para preparar la cena.
sentences.english: The kitchen is clean and ready to prepare dinner.

sentences.spanish: Pon la almohada sobre la cama, por favor.
sentences.english: Put the pillow on the bed, please.

sentences.spanish: El sofá del salón es muy cómodo para ver la televisión.
sentences.english: The living room sofa is very comfortable for watching TV.

sentences.spanish: Hay que lavar los platos en el fregadero.
sentences.english: The plates must be washed in the sink.

sentences.spanish: Abre la ventana para que entre aire fresco.
sentences.english: Open the window so that fresh air comes in.

almohada.mnemonic: Al-mo-hada... A lot of hair (mohair) on the 'pillow'.

ventana.mnemonic: Vent (ventana) the room by opening the window.

cama.mnemonic: Come, let's go to sleep in the bed (cama).
